summary: Added 5 case studies, Brazil AI Bill compliance framework, 3 learning resources, EU AI Act playbook, and 3 news sources.

items: Microsoft 365 Copilot — Enterprise productivity AI deployed at 40%+ of Fortune 500
Stripe Radar — ML fraud detection across $1T+ in annual payments
DeepMind / NHS — AI eye disease detection matching senior ophthalmologist accuracy
Rolls-Royce TotalCare — Predictive engine maintenance preventing $500M+ in removals
DHL AI Logistics — Demand forecasting and route optimisation saving €300M+ annually
Brazil AI Bill (PL 2338/2023) — Senate-passed, EU AI Act-inspired framework for 215M citizens
Kaggle Learn — Free interactive ML micro-courses used by millions
AI Agents in LangGraph — DeepLearning.AI course on agentic AI (2025)
Build a Large Language Model From Scratch — Sebastian Raschka's 2024 bestseller
EU AI Act Compliance Checklist — 4-step practitioner checklist for Article 5 prohibitions, Annex IV conformity and Article 52/86 transparency
